name: Shiesty Femvincible
description:
Shiesty femvincible is now my favorite variant from the artist (blannis_art) "She's soo fine~ and dripped out 🙏🏾😭"

History: Veil Invincible was one of the variants of Invincibles who would be assembled by Angstrom Levy to start the Invincible War in the mainstream dimension.

Much of Veil Invincible's history is unknown, except for the fact that she became a supervillain in her reality.

Veil was one of the evil variants of Invincibles to be recruited by Angstrom Levy to cause havoc and destruction the mainstream dimension, which started the war known as the "Invincible War".
creator: mckenneymg123
